meaning: adj.米考伯式的,无远虑而老想走运的
examples: This company's Micawberish view of its prospects does not inspire faith that 2008 will be any better than 2007.
This company's Micawberish view of its prospects does not inspire faith that 2008 will be any better than 2007, " Mann said.
But in the Caribbean, there is a Micawberish assumption that when things get really tough, someone will step in to provide.
